narrative:
Eaton Township has 4,611 registered voters, with 56.0% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 26.9% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 17.1%, a clear Republican lean of 9.9 percentage points.
